subcodes.first_line: O spiritual one! Thy letter hath arrived and attained the honor of being heard in the Most Holy and Most Exalted Presence. The fragrance of the All-Merciful's love hath wafted forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا روحانی نامه ات رسید و در ساحت امنع اقدس بشرف اصغا فائز گشت نفحه محبت رحمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
